intake.user_request: Run /create-workorder against STUB-INDEXING-ORCHESTRATOR-PATH-NORMALIZATION-001 (CORE) to author a follow-up WO. Phase classification: post-rebuild maintenance (NOT a Phase 7 reopen).

classification.plan_type_rationale: Bug fix in a single function (~10-20 LOC) with new unit + invariant tests + E2E verification. Multiple ordered tasks with halt gates between code change, test additions, and dynamic re-verification — fits phased pattern (not strict because no foundation-doc surgery, not light because halt gates matter for AC-09 dynamic alignment).

in_scope: Modify normalizeChunkFile() in src/integration/rag/indexing-orchestrator.ts so absolute-Windows-path chunk.file values correctly map to relative-POSIX graph node.file keys
Peel 'file:' URI prefix before basePath strip (stub option 1) OR equivalent path.relative()-based approach (stub option 2) — implementer selects
Add 1 unit test in __tests__/integration/rag/ asserting the join succeeds on absolute-Windows + relative-POSIX fixture
Extend __tests__/pipeline/indexing-gate-invariant.test.ts with chunksSkipped >= header_missing_count - tolerance assertion
Re-run E2E smoke fixtures and confirm AC-09 dynamic alignment holds
out_of_scope: Phase 7 archive reopen — the 9-phase pipeline rebuild is COMPLETE
Doc changes outside this WO directory

constraints: MUST NOT reopen Phase 7 archive (rebuild is complete)
MUST NOT add fields to IndexingResult schema (DR-PHASE-7-B locked additive)
MUST NOT add new SkipReason enum values (existing header_status_missing is correct)
